raw_text: LedgerUp Product Testimonials FAQ Book a demo Book a demo When billing gets complex We make it simple We understand you need problems solved, not more software to manage. That's why we deliver results, not dashboards. Book a call Book a call Trusted by leading startups Billing shouldn't feel like duct tape Manual follow-ups. Unbilled usage. Missed invoices. Spreadsheets everywhere. It s not a system it s leaking revenue. Chasing payments Manual nudges. Back-and-forth emails. Constant check-ins just to get paid. Lost invoices Late payments and lost invoices. No clean view of what s owed or what s overdue. Disconnected Data Disconnected systems forcing you to manually match contracts, invoices, and payments. Unclear ARR Messy spreadsheets make it hard to track recurring revenue or plan ahead with confidence. Sending an invoice doesn't mean getting paid. We save Ops teams 20 hours per week creating and following up on invoices LedgerUp automates RevOps - in Slack No dashboards, no extra hires. Meet Ari Meet Ari Automate the entire Revenue Flow With Ari AI From signed contract to paid invoice - handled, right in Slack Book a call Book a call Never miss a payment step No dashboards. No back and forth. Just approve, edit, and track right inside Slack. Know exactly what's paid and what's not One thread, one timeline. All your approvals, checks, and overdue invoices in sync Handles the tricky contracts too Usage-based billing, tiered pricing, milestone based deals Ari tracks it all and invoices correctly, end to end. How it works Automate your contract-to-cash flow in 3 connected steps zero dashboards, fully hands-off. 1 Connect Connect sales and contract tools Sync your CRM and contract platforms like Salesforce, HubSpot, DocuSign, and more. Ari picks up the moment a deal is signed. Works with: Docusign DropboxSign (Hellosign) Salesforce Hubspot Adobe Sign Snowflake Supabase 2 Streamline Sync billing and payment systems Link tools like Stripe and QuickBooks. Invoices, payments, and reconciliations flow without the manual mess. Works with: Stripe Quickbooks Plaid Stable 3 Automate Every step handled right in Slack Ari generates the invoice, follows up, reconciles payments, and closes the loop. No new UI. No headcount. No revenue leakage. Without leaving Slack Ari Ai $ Invoiced and followed up by Ari Real results from real customers Automate your contract-to-cash flow in 3 connected steps - zero dashboards, fully hands-off +75% Improvement in collection speed 80+ Hours saved monthly "Ari makes our old billing process look like a snail. He s faster than any human and turned our quote to cash into true autopilot" Tristan Lefler Co-Founder @Buzz "Real time revenue at startup speed. Exactly what we were looking for as we scale" Quili Pe a Chief of Staff @HappyRobot 160+ Hours saved monthly 1 month Return on investment Ari Hire your new AI Teammate Get started Get started Frequently asked questions Can Ari handle our complicated contracts? Which tools does Ari integrate with today? What does onboarding look like really? How accurate is Ari? Do we get human support? Is our data secure? What ROI should we expect? Join the fastest growing companies using LedgerUp Try LedgerUp today Try LedgerUp today San Francisco 165 Page St, San Francisco, CA 94102, United States Privacy Policy Terms & Conditions 2025 LedgerUp

Request free demo Feed post number 1 Featured Page 1 of 2 Previous Next Post LedgerUp LedgerUp 1,922 followers 1,922 followers Request demo 7mo 7 months ago Visible to anyone on or off LinkedIn Big news for finance teams tired of wrestling with revenue recognition! Ever spent countless hours reconciling Stripe payments with QuickBooks? You're not alone. Revenue recognition is notorious for: 1 Eating up entire days of your finance team's time 2 Creating costly errors from manual data entry 3 Delaying your month-end close That's why we're excited to announce our new automatic revenue recognition feature that connects Stripe directly to QuickBooks! What used to take days now happens in seconds. No more spreadsheets, no more manual entries, no more headaches. Your revenue data flows seamlessly from Stripe to QuickBooks, giving you: Real-time revenue visibility Automated journal entries Perfect accuracy More time for strategic work Ready to give your finance team their time back? That was the reality for Gather a few months ago-until they invited our AI agent Ari into Slack. What changed: - Hundreds of polite, perfectly-timed collections emails went out without anyone opening a spreadsheet. - Every incoming payment auto-matched to the right invoice-no more manual reconciliation. - Upcoming renewals surfaced weeks in advance, complete with pre-built outreach for the CSM team. - Contracts, receipts, and usage data flowed straight into HubSpot and Google Sheets, so sales always had live revenue numbers. The best part for us? Working with Brian and the Gather crew has been a blast. Their team moves fast, asks tough questions, and cares deeply about clean data-exactly the environment where Ari shines. We re excited to keep automating the busywork as Gather scales from dozens of invoices to thousands. If your finance ops feel like a game of whack-a-mole, take a look at the full story below and ping me for a quick walk-through. That world doesn t exist anymore. Today s revenue is messy: Every contract is different Usage fluctuates Overages get missed Amendments pile up Procurement rules change And your billing tool is still pretending everything is standard. But LedgerUp was built for the chaos. We handle edge cases like it s our job because it is. We live in your Slack like your teammates. We automate the gruntwork, and we adapt as your billing evolves. LedgerUp is not another software to manage; we are your teammate who does the work. more Activate to view larger image, Activate to view larger image, 5 3 reposts 1 2 3 4 5 Show all posts Products LedgerUp Financial Analytics Software Add as skill LedgerUp is an AI-powered accounts receivable and billing platform that automates the entire invoicing and collections process for growing businesses. Their AI agent, Ari, can extract key details from customer contracts, generate and send invoices, track usage and revenue, and automate follow-ups with overdue customers - all without human intervention. This helps companies like scale their finance operations and improve cash flow, while freeing up the accounting team to focus on higher-value work. LedgerUp seamlessly integrates with existing systems like CRMs, CPQ tools, and billing platforms to provide a centralized hub for managing the revenue lifecycle. With intelligent automation and data-driven insights, LedgerUp empowers finance teams to optimize their billing and collections processes. Feed post number 1 Page posts Page 1 of 5 Previous Next LedgerUp reposted this LedgerUp LedgerUp 1,922 followers 1,922 followers 3w Edited 3 weeks ago Edited Visible to anyone on or off LinkedIn When you re shipping a major product launch, the last thing you want is a mountain of overdue invoices and renewal dates slipping through the cracks. That was the reality for Gather a few months ago-until they invited our AI agent Ari into Slack. What changed: - Hundreds of polite, perfectly-timed collections emails went out without anyone opening a spreadsheet. - Every incoming payment auto-matched to the right invoice-no more manual reconciliation. - Upcoming renewals surfaced weeks in advance, complete with pre-built outreach for the CSM team. - Contracts, receipts, and usage data flowed straight into HubSpot and Google Sheets, so sales always had live revenue numbers. The best part for us? Working with Brian and the Gather crew has been a blast. Their team moves fast, asks tough questions, and cares deeply about clean data-exactly the environment where Ari shines. We re excited to keep automating the busywork as Gather scales from dozens of invoices to thousands. If your finance ops feel like a game of whack-a-mole, take a look at the full story below and ping me for a quick walk-through. Products LedgerUp Financial Analytics Software Add as skill LedgerUp is an AI-powered accounts receivable and billing platform that automates the entire invoicing and collections process for growing businesses. Their AI agent, Ari, can extract key details from customer contracts, generate and send invoices, track usage and revenue, and automate follow-ups with overdue customers - all without human intervention. This helps companies like scale their finance operations and improve cash flow, while freeing up the accounting team to focus on higher-value work. LedgerUp seamlessly integrates with existing systems like CRMs, CPQ tools, and billing platforms to provide a centralized hub for managing the revenue lifecycle. With intelligent automation and data-driven insights, LedgerUp empowers finance teams to optimize their billing and collections processes.
